---
title: "Lexun Yu"
image: './images/about/profile.webp'
about:
  template: solana
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/lexun-yu
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/yulexun
    - icon: envelope
      text: lyu@prpr.one
      href: mailto:lyu@prpr.one
---

# About Me

I'm Lexun Yu, a tech enthusiast based in Beijing with experience in cloud, DevOps, and web development. I enjoy building scalable systems and interactive fictions, and have a strong interest in automation and open source.

## Skills

**Programming Languages & Scripting**
- Python, Bash, JavaScript, HTML, CSS, R, SQL, Groovy

**Cloud & Infrastructure**
- Docker, Docker Swarm, Kubernetes, QEMU/KVM, Linux, Nginx, Azure, Networking

**DevOps & Automation**
- Git, CI/CD (Jenkins, GitHub Actions, GitLab CI/CD), Terraform, Ansible, FluxCD

**Monitoring & Visualization**
- Prometheus, Grafana, Loki

**Documentation & Publishing**
- Jupyter, Quarto, Typst

## Education

- University of Toronto
- University of Melbourne (Current)

## Certifications

- CompTIA Network+ (2024)
